zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Childe於1467年出生在英國武斯特斯爾諾維其可時，他的父親William Childe35歲，母親Johannah Child33歲。他於1487年與Alice在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1524年3月13日在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Childe于1467年出生在英国武斯特斯爾諾維其可时，他的父亲William Childe35岁，母亲Johannah Child33岁。他于1487年与Alice在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1524年3月13日在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Childe was born in 1467, in Northwick, Worcestershire, England, his father, William Childe, was 35 and his mother, Johannah Child, was 33. He married Alice in 1487, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 March 1524, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Childe est né en 1467, à Northwick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Childe, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Johannah Child, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Alice en 1487, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1524, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Childe 1467 in Northwick, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Childe 35 und seine Mutter Johannah Child 33. Er hat 1487 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Alice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. März 1524 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Childe è nato il nel 1467 nel Northwick, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, William Childe, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Johannah Child, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Alice nel 1487, nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 marzo 1524, nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Childeが1467年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノースウィックで生まれた時，父William Childeは35歳，母Johannah Childは33歳であった。1487年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでAliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1524年3月13日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Childe(이)가 1467년 영국 워스스터실르 노르스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Childe(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Johannah Child(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 3월 13일 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Childe nasceu em 1467, em Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Childe, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Johannah Child, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice em 1487, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1524, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Childe родился в 1467 г. в местности нортвикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Childe было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Johannah Child, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice в 1487 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 марта 1524 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Childe nació en 1467, en Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Childe, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Johannah Child, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Alice en 1487, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1524, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
